title: Bulk invoice actions: PDF Exports
summaryBody: Allow users to download all bills for a given period for a given client. This will not live as a bulk action on the invoice table but as a seperate stand alone action.
detailBody: Allow users to download all bills for a given period for a given client. This will not live as a bulk action on the invoice table but as a seperate stand alone action.
